name: @maanasa-s-5539/crashpoint-integrations-mcp
description: MCP server providing Zoho Cliq notifications and Zoho Projects bug-reporting integrations for CrashPoint crash analysis reports.

scripts.build:
tsc --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist && esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node
import { createRequire as __cq } from 'module'; import { fileURLToPath as __ftp } from 'url'; import { dirname as __dn } from 'path'; const require = __cq(import.meta.url); globalThis.__filename = __ftp(import.meta.url); globalThis.__dirname = __dn(globalThis.__filename);" --external:module --external:fs --external:path --external:os --external:crypto --external:child_process --external:url --external:stream --external:events --external:util --external:net --external:tls --external:http --external:https --external:assert --external:buffer --external:string_decoder --external:readline --external:tty --external:worker_threads

author: maanasa-s-5539
